overall.description: A cinematic static shot from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a futuristic metropolis at dusk. The camera is positioned on an elevated hillside overlooking the neon-lit skyline, with a highway visible in the foreground and a flying vehicle passing through the evening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated hillside overlook of futuristic metropolis

events.description: flying vehicle enters from left and traverses across the sky toward the right

agents.ego_description: stationary at an elevated vantage point, observing the cityscape and skyline

notable_agents.action: flying across the sky from left to right above the city

entered.detail: dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers with neon signage and industrial structures
curved multi-lane highway with sparse moving vehicle lights
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades displaying colorful graphics
tall industrial crane atop central skyscraper indicating ongoing construction
silhouetted trees and bushes framing the left side of the overlook
silhouetted trees framing the right side of the view

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view from an elevated grassy overlook showing a sprawling futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The skyline features towering glass and steel structures with vibrant neon billboards, while a highway curves through the valley below. The sky transitions from warm orange to deep blue as a flying vehicle crosses the frame from left to right, and sparse traffic moves along the distant roads.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static panoramic vista of a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis as the atmosphere shifts from the warmth of dusk to the deep tones of evening. It begins from an elevated grassy overlook, capturing a vast skyline of towering glass and steel structures illuminated by vibrant neon billboards. As the camera holds its position, the sky transitions from a warm orange glow into a deep blue, casting a cooler light over the valley below. The scene then focuses on the movement within the city, where a flying vehicle crosses the frame from left to right while sparse traffic flows along the curving highway in the distance.
